falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if at least 2 of 3 metrics pass: GDP volume falls by more than 15 percent year on year in the lockdown observation, 2020Q4 unemployment is above 15 percent at the first cached post-lockdown endpoint, and 2020Q4 unemployment remains below 20 percent. REFUTED if 1 or fewer pass.

metrics.description: Real GDP volume index fell sharply in the first lockdown year.
EPA unemployment was elevated at the first cached post-lockdown endpoint.
Unemployment stayed below GFC-era Spanish peaks despite the GDP shock.
